compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome has undergone a near-total collapse of the expected registry. P1 (Yellow Pot) is empty/soil-only. P2/P4 (Black Pot) shows a single, failing leaf remnant. P3 (Black Pot) is missing the white rabbit anchor and the primary specimen.

plant_audit.p2_p4_black_pot: Contains one chlorotic, dying leaf fragment. No viable plant structure remains.
plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Missing anchor (rabbit) and plant. Soil surface appears undisturbed but barren.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and inert across all containers.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshell fragments in the black pot, likely an amateur attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrent, now serving no functional purpose.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single leaf and rabbit anchor.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Rabbit anchor removed; pot contents appear to be declining.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Total loss of structural integrity; the remaining leaf is necrotic and the desk surface is cleared of the primary biological subjects.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is non-viable. The specimens have either been removed or have succumbed to total senescence. The environment is currently a 'dead' setup.
anomalies: Complete disappearance of all catalogued plant life
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic decline in the botanical biome. Over the 5-day observation period, the plants have been systematically removed or have perished. The current state is a collection of empty pots containing only residual soil and debris. The absence of the scale anchor (rabbit) suggests a deliberate clearing of the desk space.
